description: After filing the federal return, a taxpayer needs to e-file their state income tax return.

nodes.task_description: Import the relevant data from the completed federal return into the state tax return form.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully transfers federal AGI and other necessary data to the state form.

nodes.task_description: Make any necessary state-specific adjustments (e.g., for municipal bond interest).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly makes all required state adjustments.

nodes.task_description: Finalize and e-file the state tax return.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully submits the state return and receives an acceptance confirmation.
